outputs.label: Dosing Weight
outputs.formula: IF(sex == 1, IF(actual_total_weight >= 0.7 * (50 + 2.3 * (height - 60)) AND actual_total_weight <= 1.3 * (50 + 2.3 * (height - 60)), actual_total_weight, 50 + 2.3 * (height - 60) + 0.4 * (actual_total_weight - (50 + 2.3 * (height - 60)))), IF(actual_total_weight >= 0.7 * (45.5 + 2.3 * (height - 60)) AND actual_total_weight <= 1.3 * (45.5 + 2.3 * (height - 60)), actual_total_weight, 45.5 + 2.3 * (height - 60) + 0.4 * (actual_total_weight - (45.5 + 2.3 * (height - 60)))))
